_meta.description: Substack publications polled via public RSS ({URL}/feed). Raw feed: title + excerpt + link + entity tags, no AI. Free posts give full-ish content in RSS; paid posts give preview only. We store only a short excerpt (capped at 280 chars) either way and always link back to the original post.
_meta.validation_status: 20 publications curated by Jorge. Marc Stein verified earlier; the other 19 are pending local validation. Custom-domain Substacks (truehoop.com, houseofstrauss.com, etc.) need a matching entry in the CORS Worker allowlist for the BROWSER live-fetch to reach them — handled in the same PR (worker-cors/src/index.js). The server-side poll_substack.py poller is uncostrained by CORS, so it picks these up immediately. Validate locally with: `python -m scripts.poll_substack --dry-run --since-hours 168 -v` and prune any feed that 404s.
